title: Torness: Substation Failure
evidence: Automated sensor alert: Level 1 threshold exceeded at regional substation. Cooling systems operational.

assessment.justification: South Western Power monitoring systems detect voltage fluctuations and localized substation failures in the area.
assessment.synthesis: Evidence shows localized environmental stress and reported infrastructure failure based on official reports.
assessment.confidenceStatement: This is a Medium confidence assessment.
